content.en:
"There was a backlash in this body, and it seemed that the mobilization of the fragments of the Mishu Disk had caused some taboo and caused a big problem in this body. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

He couldn't solve this problem, and the longer he used it, the more severe the body's backlash became, and it would even cause the replica body to fall.

But as long as it doesn't affect other replicated bodies, he doesn't care.

With the help of the Pivot Disk Fragment, Ye Tian became more and more aware of the Darkest Ultimate Rules, and the Darkest Ultimate Rules improved rapidly, and he also had a certain understanding of the Darkest Ultimate Body.

Time flies.

Long years have passed.

Ye Tian's Ultimate Darkness Ultimate Rule had been raised to the realm of one hundred and fifty levels, which was already an extremely high level.

But what excites Ye Tian the most is not this, but the creation of his comprehension of the Black Giant Pillar and the beginning of touching the Darkest Ultimate Body.

He has the hope of creating a practice of the darkest ultimate body.

For this reason, he began to desperately deduce enlightenment.

One by one, the replica bodies fell in the fragments of the Urging Pivot Disk, but he was still doing it.

In this way, hundreds of billions of yuan have passed.

For Ye Tian, this penance can be regarded as a long time 26.

And after such a long time, countless sacrifices to copy the body, he finally created the method of the darkest ultimate body.

Compared with the ultimate body, the Ultimate Body Method is much more powerful and incomparably perfect, and it seems to be a method that has truly reached the extreme.

If it weren't for this black giant pillar, even if Ye Tian had a fragment of the Mishu Disk, he would not have been able to create the Darkest Ultimate Body Method.

For the Darkest Ultimate Body Method, the minimum standard for cultivation is to reach the Darkest Ultimate Rule to reach a hundredfold realm, and Ye Tian is to meet the requirements.

But just to meet the cultivation requirements, if you want to really achieve the initial cultivation, it is extremely difficult, it needs to consume countless resources, and at most you need to practice into a prototype, if you really want to cultivate the Darkest Ultimate Body, you need at least two hundred Extreme Rules of the Dark, and if you want to achieve something, it is estimated that you have more than three hundred Ultimate Rules of the Darkness.

Ye Tian is not demanding now, he only wants to cultivate the rudiments of the Darkest Ultimate Body now, once he is trained, his strength is estimated to be able to reach the first level of the Ultimate Realm Lord, even if it is not as good as the Extreme Heaven Venerable Them, but it will not be too weak.

However, the cultivation of the Darkest Ultimate Body Method is too resource-intensive.

Ye Tian refined the resources he found in the Ultimate Dark Domain one by one to cultivate the Ultimate Dark Body.

Time flies.

Another long period of time passed, and Ye Tian had finally cultivated the Darkest Ultimate Body into a rudimentary form after his continuous penance.

Airplanes!!!

A wisp of the breath of the darkest ultimate body appeared on his body, and the aura had undergone a qualitative change, and the strength of his body was far beyond the past.

"Just a prototype has made my body's strength skyrocket a lot, and now I can burst out with incomparably terrifying combat power with the Darkest Ultimate Rule and the Darkest Ultimate Body of the rudimentary form!"

Ye Tian muttered.

However, he still lacked an ultimate dimensional killing move that was suitable for the Ultimate Darkness Ultimate Rule, and he was ready to integrate the Extreme Darkness Ultimate Rule into the Eternal Night Abyss Knife, an ultimate dimensional killing move, so that it could contain the power of the three ultimate systems.

So, he worked hard to perfect the Eternal Night Abyss Knife.

With the help of the Pivot Disk Fragment, he quickly perfected the Eternal Night Abyss Knife, and after combining it with the Darkness Ultimate System, the power of the Eternal Night Abyss Knife skyrocketed by at least five or six times.

Coupled with the prototype of the Darkest Ultimate Body, he could now kill the ordinary second-grade Ultimate Realm Lord in an instant with a single sword.

In other words, a second-grade Ultimate Realm Lord like Yinduo Extreme Venerable is estimated to be unable to stop him.

After that, Ye Tian focused on improving the Eternal Night Ultimate Rule, the Abyssal Star Ultimate Rule, and the Darkest Ultimate Rule, and the three ultimate systems were all comprehensively improved.

Anyway, he still has the Pivot Disk Fragment, and it is relatively quick to improve the ultimate rule.

"If that Dragon Tu Extreme Venerable knows that the fragment of the Mishu Disk has helped me so much, I'm afraid it will have to ask for my entire net worth!"

Ye Tian thought secretly.

After a long time, Ye Tian's Eternal Night Ultimate Rule has been increased to more than one hundred and thirty levels, and the Abyss Star Ultimate System has also been increased to more than one hundred and thirty levels, and the Darkest Ultimate Rule has been assisted by a black giant pillar, and it has improved faster, and it has now reached two hundred and ten levels.

Due to the rapid progress of the Darkness Ultimate Rule, his current Darkness Ultimate Body has also improved a bit, at least he is closer to the beginning on the path of embryonic form.

this day.

Ye Tian was still cultivating, and those ultimate creatures attacked again.

Obviously, they are going to attack again, trying to rush out.

Whew!!!

One by one, the Ultimate Realm Masters made a move.

In the same way, they are responsible for intercepting the most terrifying Ultimate Creature, while the others intercept the other Ultimate Creatures.

Ye Tian also made a move, his target was an ultimate creature comparable to the second grade, he rushed over, cast the Eternal Night Abyss Knife, and slashed it over.

Burst!

With just one knife, this ultimate creature was directly killed by Ye Tian in seconds.

Some of the Ultimate Realm Masters who noticed the situation here were shocked.

"What, the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable killed an ultimate creature comparable to the second grade in one instant?"

Long Tu Jizun trembled.

If 403 knows, his strength is only the second grade, maybe a little weaker than the ultimate creature just now, but Ye Tian directly killed the other party in one second.

This is definitely the main combat power of the Ultimate Realm with the first grade!

"I asked for so many treasures from the Ten Thousand Law Supreme Venerable before, and sold him a spicy chicken ultimate treasure fragment, he shouldn't have a grudge against me in his heart, right?"

Long Tu Jizun thought to himself.

If Ye Tianji hated him, he felt that he was finished.

"When I turn around, apologize to him, and give him some resources. "

Long Tu Jizun decided.

After all, he didn't dare to offend Ye Tian, otherwise he would die.

"Kill!"

After all, there are not many first-grade Ultimate Realm Masters who are guarding here, and there is one more at once, which is enough to make the Ultimate Creatures chaotic, and many Ultimate Creatures were killed by Ye Tian, and even the Ultimate Creatures that are comparable to the second grade have fallen several heads.

If this continues, they will lose a lot.

As a result, those ultimate creatures retreated one after another, but Ye Tian and the others still chased and killed, killing many ultimate creatures again.

But in the end, they still didn't chase down, after all, without the suppression of the Ultimate Formation, they would not have an advantage when they reached the depths of the Ultimate Dark Domain.
